name: 2016 Topps Allen & Ginter Baseball Cards – Review & Hit Gallery Added

sections.title: Base
sections.odds: 351 cards. *Card #120 is listed for two different players on the official checklist (Urias & Maeda) but the Urias card is not numbered. Urias is believed to be a super short print (SSP). · Cards #301-350 are short prints (SP) - 1:2 packs. · PARALLEL CARDS: A&G Glossy 1/1. · MINI PARALLEL CARDS: Base Mini, A&G Back - 1:5 packs, A&G Black-Bordered - 1:10 packs, A&G No Number #/50, A&G Brooklyn Back #/25, A&G Wood 1/1 (Hobby), A&G Glossy 1/1.

sections.title: Mini Exclusives
sections.odds: 50 cards. Cards #351-400. Hobby only. · PARALLEL CARDS: Metal #/3, Wood 1/1.
